untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculating rolling correlation coefficient between 250-day historical returns and 25-day forward returns with p-value testing. The allowed indicator set does not include correlation computation, p-value calculation, or forward-looking return correlation analysis. These are complex statistical measures that require custom calculation outside standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: The core logic of this strategy (correlation of past 250-day returns with future 25-day returns at r=0.2719, p=0.0238) cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. A proper implementation would require a custom indicator that computes rolling Pearson correlation and associated p-values between lagged return series. The entry conditions reference a statistical relationship that is not available in the standard indicator library.
